title: basananthe hederae
intro: Basananthe hederae, also known as the Ivy Ivy climber or Poison Ivy climber, is a type of flowering plant in the Celastraceae family native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever and treating various infections, as well as its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Basananthe hederae are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
